---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new demo, helper, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature or demo you have in mind. -->

## Why is it valuable?

<!-- Who benefits? What problem does it solve that the current demos don't? -->

## Sketch / approach (optional)

<!-- If you have a sense of how this could be implemented, share it. Notebook outline, algorithm choice, data source. -->

## Are you interested in contributing it?

<!-- If yes, see CONTRIBUTING.md. We'd love help. -->
